name: FightForrestFerrach
_source: s;Ferrach;So we meet again, Medea's knight in shining armor.;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None
s;Ferrach;So you're that dashing knight who rescued the princess, hm?;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None
s;Ferrach;Quite the rash one, coming for her all on your own.;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None
s;Forrest;You have no right to judge me on my actions.;StyleNid=boss_convo_right;MessageTail=None
s;Ferrach;Hah! I can't exactly be judgemental here.;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None
s;Ferrach;In actuality, I find it amusing that thinking with the heart|rather than the head is hereditary.;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None
s;Ferrach;You remind me of myself, actually.|{c:e;Ferrach;HalfCloseEyes,Smile}Hm{tgm}...{tgm} In fact, I wonder if{tgm}...;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None

s;Ferrach;Have you really not figured it out yet?|{c:e;Ferrach;HalfCloseEyes,Smile}Or are you averting your eyes from the truth?|{c:e;Ferrach;CloseEyes,Smile}That seems to be a common thing among you Medeans.;StyleNid=boss_convo_left;MessageTail=None

s;Forrest;Such things are meaningless{br}to me.|{c:e;Forrest;NormalBlink}I fight for Her Highness and will defeat her foes one by one.|{c:e;Forrest;HalfCloseEyes}Starting with you, hellspawn.;StyleNid=boss_convo_right;MessageTail=None
